import json, codecs, io, os, re, unicodedata, math, difflib, numpy as np

# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
    
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadiths)

# inspect a sample entry
list(quran[0].keys())[:10], list(hadiths[0].keys())[:20]

# Build lists of text fields
hadith_texts = []
for h in hadiths:
    txt = h.get("hadithTxt") or h.get("Matn") or ""
    hadith_texts.append(txt)

# Quick search for words with "أخت" or "اختك"
hits_idx = [i for i,txt in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "أُخْتَ" in txt or "أخت" in txt or "اخْت" in normalize_ar(txt)]
len(hits_idx)

for i in hits_idx[:20]:
    print(i, hadiths[i].get("hadithID"), hadith_texts[i][:200].replace("\n"," "))

cand_idxs = [i for i,txt in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "لا تزوج" in normalize_ar(txt) or "لا تُزوِّج" in txt or "لا تُزَوِّج" in txt or "لا تزَوِّج" in txt or "لا تزَوَّج" in txt]
len(cand_idxs)

for i in cand_idxs:
    print(i, hadiths[i].get("BookID"), hadith_texts[i][:200].replace("\n"," "))

i = 32455
print(hadiths[i]['hadithTxt'])

i = 32479
print(hadiths[i]['hadithTxt'])

subs = [i for i,txt in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "لا" in txt and ("عمتها" in txt or "خالتها" in txt or "عمت" in normalize_ar(txt) or "خالت" in normalize_ar(txt))]
len(subs)

# Filter for phrase "لا يجمع بين المرأة وعمتها ولا بين المرأة وخالتها" like
cand = []
for i in subs:
    t = hadith_texts[i]
    if "لا يجمع" in t or "لا يُجْمَع" in t or "لا تُنكح" in t or "لا تنكح" in t or "لا تنكح" in normalize_ar(t):
        cand.append(i)
len(cand), cand[:10]

for i in cand:
    print(i, hadiths[i].get('hadithID'), hadith_texts[i][:300].replace("\n"," "))

# Search for "أختك" exactly
idxs_ukhtak = [i for i,txt in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "أختك" in txt or "اختك" in normalize_ar(txt)]
len(idxs_ukhtak)

for i in idxs_ukhtak:
    print(i, hadiths[i].get('hadithID'), hadith_texts[i][:300].replace("\n"," "))

# Search quran for ayat containing "أَخَوَاتُكُمْ" or 'اخواتكم'
q_candidates = [q for q in quran if "أَخَوَاتُكُمْ" in q['ayah_text'] or "اخواتكم" in normalize_ar(q['ayah_text'])]
[(c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id'], c['ayah_text']) for c in q_candidates]

span_full = "لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ أُختَكَ"
span_snippet = "لا تَزَوَّ...َّ أُختَكَ"
def best_matches_in_texts(span, texts, topn=10):
    sims = []
    for i, txt in enumerate(texts):
        s = robust_sim(span, txt)
        sims.append((s,i))
    sims.sort(reverse=True)
    return sims[:topn]

best_hadith = best_matches_in_texts(span_full, hadith_texts, topn=20)
best_hadith[:5]

for s,i in best_hadith[:20]:
    print(s, i, hadith_texts[i][:200].replace("\n"," "))

def indices_with_word(word, texts):
    idxs = [i for i,t in enumerate(texts) if word in t or word in normalize_ar(t)]
    return idxs

ukht_idxs = indices_with_word("أخت", hadith_texts) + indices_with_word("اخت", hadith_texts)
ukht_idxs = sorted(set(ukht_idxs))
len(ukht_idxs)

# Evaluate sim within these
scores = []
for i in ukht_idxs:
    s = robust_sim(span_full, hadith_texts[i])
    scores.append((s,i))
scores.sort(reverse=True)
scores[:10]

for s,i in scores[:10]:
    print(s, i, hadith_texts[i][:220].replace("\n"," "))

# Search for exact 'تزوجن' or 'تزَوَّجَنَّ'
idxs = [i for i,t in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "تزوجن" in normalize_ar(t) or "تَزَوَّجَنَّ" in t or "تزَوَّجَنَّ" in t or "تزوّجن" in normalize_ar(t)]
len(idxs), idxs[:20]

for i in idxs[:30]:
    print(i, hadiths[i].get('hadithID'), hadith_texts[i][:250].replace("\n"," "))

idxs = [i for i,t in enumerate(hadith_texts) if ("أختها" in t or "اختها" in normalize_ar(t)) and ("لا تنكح" in t or "لا تُنكح" in t or "لا تنكح" in normalize_ar(t))]
len(idxs), idxs[:10]

for i in idxs:
    print(i, hadith_texts[i][:400].replace("\n"," "))

# search quran for "تزوج" or "لا تنكح"
res_q1 = [i for i,q in enumerate(quran) if "تزوج" in normalize_ar(q['ayah_text'])]
res_q2 = [i for i,q in enumerate(quran) if "تنكح" in normalize_ar(q['ayah_text']) or "لا تنكح" in normalize_ar(q['ayah_text'])]
len(res_q1), len(res_q2), res_q2[:10]

# print these ayat briefly
for i in res_q2:
    a = quran[i]
    print(a['surah_id'], a['ayah_id'], a['ayah_text'])

idxs = [i for i,t in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "تَزَوَّجَنَّ" in t or "تزَوَّجَنَّ" in t or "تزوَّجنَّ" in t]
len(idxs), idxs

best_hadith_snip = best_matches_in_texts(span_snippet, hadith_texts, topn=5)
best_hadith_snip

idxs = [i for i,t in enumerate(hadith_texts) if "على أختها" in t or "على اختها" in normalize_ar(t)]
len(idxs), idxs[:10]
